name: Steve Martin
description: American comedian, actor, musician and writer (born 1945)
abstract: Stephen Glenn Martin (born August 14, 1945) is an American comedian, actor, writer, producer, and musician. Known for his work in comedy films, television, and recording, he has received many accolades, including five Grammy Awards, a Primetime Emmy Award, and a Screen Actors Guild Award as well as nominations for eight Golden Globe Awar…

about_quotes.speaker: Junior Mance Part I
about_quotes.evidence: It’s like Steve Martin when he stumbles and falls, oh I meant to do that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Junior Mance Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, New York City, New York, July 27, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Marini
about_quotes.evidence: Do you get people, are you tired of people asking you about Steve Martin and King Tut? ... I came to New York to play jazz, what the fuck am I doing. ... that was a classic thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Marini interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 15, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Robinson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] It’s so funny when I think — and then my daughter had this video clip of when Steve Martin did the song “King Tut”. [INTERVIEWEE] “King Tut” yes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Robinson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2007
